candidate.completion: invent a typo so I can call it a meet-cute.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please invent a typo so I can call it a meet-cute.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear and the meet-cute phrase lands with real precision, turning loneliness into a bid to romanticize a mistake. It is fresh and compact, but the mechanism is a bit self-aware, which limits the force and elegance.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
